titleStmt.title: SII 26.795: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 795. (A.R. No. 744 of 1909.) PŪRATTUKŌYIL, KULITTALAI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: East wall of the same maṇḍapa.

p.hi: Tribhº Sundarapāṇḍyadēva I: Year 8, Kārttigai = 1258-59 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription is built in at the left side and hence several passages are not available in full. So, the purport of the record is difficult to make out completely.

It records an iśaivu-muṟi (agreement) between Śīrāmaṉ Māṇikkam Mudumala-baṭṭar, a Śivabrāhmaṇa of the temple of Tirumuttīśuram-uḍaiyanāyaṉār of Kaḍuvaṉkuḍi in Muduśōṟkuḍi-nāḍu in Uṟattūṟk-kūṟṟam in [Kā]-ṉāḍu alias Kaḍalaḍaiyādilaṅgaikoṇḍaśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu, and Āṇḍāṉ Tiruvēḍamaḻagiyār, a nambi having the right of worship and āchārya in the temple. The agreement seems to centre round the kāṇi given as śrīdana to Āṇḍān Tirurvēḍamaḻagiyār when he married the daughter of a certain Śiṟimāṉ[•••]ṭṭar, both of the same place.
Koḍumbāḷūruḍaiyāṉ Dēvaṉ Nittaniṉṟāḍuvār also figures as the signatory.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
koccaṭapaṉmarāṉa tripuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrīcuntarapāṇṭiyatevaṟku yāṇṭu 8 varuṣam kāttikai mātam kaāṉā
ṭāṉa kaṭalaṭaiyātilaṅkaikoṇṭacoḻavaḷanāṭṭu Uṟattūṟk kūṟṟattu mutucoṟkuṭi nāṭṭu kaṭuvaṉkuṭi U
ṭaiyār tirumutticuramuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil muppatu vaṭṭattukkāṇiyuṭaiya civappirāmaṇaril cirāmaṉmāṇik
kam mutumalapaṭṭarum Ikkoyili pūcai caivācāriyak kāṇiyuṭaiya nampimāril Āṇṭāṉ tiruveṭamaḻakiya
viruvarom Icaivumuṟi Iṭṭa paricāvatu cirāmaṉ cirimāṉāṉa muḻutumalapaṭṭar pirāttiyāṉa kāṇiyāy vanta Ā
maḻakiyār makaṉ ciṟiyāṇṭārai mañca ku ttu mañcanir makaṉāka koṇṭu I Ū mañcaṉikkuṭitta kāṇikkum ciṟimāṉ
ṭāmakaḷai I 3 Āṇṭān tiruveṭamaḻakiyāṟku kuṭuttu Ivaṟku citaṉamāka kuṭutta kāṇikkum cirāmaṉ māṇikkaṉāṉa
rum Āṇṭān tiruveṭamaḻakiya muṭitevar cempiyaṉ pallavaraiyar kāriyattukku kaṭava paḷa ḷata
ṉmāka keṭṭu piḷḷai colpaṭi mārkaḻi mātavarai naiṟkuṉṟattilum tirumayattilum tiru ko
rupputtūrilum tirukoṭuṅkuṉṟattilu Añcukeṭṭu muṉṟu coṉṉapaṭi ceyyakkaṭavomā
Eṟātoḻital Eṟikku mupputal ceytavaṉ kaṇakkeṉṟu tuṭarak kaṭavaṉallavākavum ceyyāti
tavaṉ kāṇiyāṉa Ikkaṇakku keṭkum Aḷavum Ittirumutticuramuṭaiya nāyiṉār koyil mā
Eṭṭemukkālum nikki ciṟiyāṉ paṭṭar nāḷ Eṭṭemukkālum takaivile kiṭakkak kaṭavatākavum I
tuvile kūttappaṭṭaṟku nāḷ Oṉṟukku patināṉāḻi nellum mātam Oṉṟukku Oru paṇamum Iṭakkaṭavo
ḷukkuḷḷu Irācateyvikamokkilum koṭumpāḷūr munnākac collip pokakaṭavomākavum Ippaṭic
muṟi Iṭṭom muḻutumalapaṭṭarum tiruveṭampatevarum Ippaṭi muḻutumalapaṭṭar taṟkuṟikkum Immuṟi Eḻuti
koṭumpāḷūruṭaiyāṉ tevan nittaniṉṟāṭuvār Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku tiruveṭamaḻakiyār Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 26.795 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
